prestazioni: Replace the stock 13B-REW 2-rotor Wankel engine with a fully ported and balanced 13B-REW from a Mazda RX-7 FD3S, featuring a custom billet aluminum rotor housing with 3mm apex seal upgrades (Mazda Motorsports part #R13B-REW-PORTED), paired with a Garrett GT35R turbocharger (84mm compressor wheel, .82 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 4-inch stainless steel exhaust system with a Tomei 4-2-1 header and dual 3.5-inch straight-pipe exits

Install a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with a custom rotary-specific fuel and ignition map, utilizing dual ID1000 fuel injectors and a Bosch 044 fuel pump, alongside a custom water-methanol injection system (AEM 3400cc/min) to manage intake temperatures and prevent detonation under boost (targeting 1.5 bar of boost pressure)

Upgrade the stock 5-speed transmission with a Holinger RD6 sequential gearbox (dog-ring engagement, 1000Nm torque capacity) and a Sachs twin-disc carbon clutch, paired with a Cusco 2-way limited-slip differential and a custom aluminum driveshaft from Driveshaft Shop (rated for 800hp)
estetica: Install a full carbon fiber widebody kit from Veilside Fortune 737C edition (hand-laid 2x2 twill weave, clear-coated matte finish), featuring extended front fenders, custom side skirts, and a rear diffuser with integrated tow hooks (Mazdaspeed OEM-style)

Replace the stock headlights with custom Hella 90mm projector units (bi-xenon, 4500K color temperature) and integrate a full LED taillight conversion (Osram LEDriving SL series), while adding a custom carbon fiber front splitter with integrated canards (Rocket Bunny 737C-specific design)

Apply a full vinyl wrap in Mazda Racing’s historic 700-series livery (3M 2080 Gloss Racing Green with matte black accents), including custom decals for the rotary engine badges (13B-REW script in white) and a carbon fiber hood with a functional NACA duct (Seibon Carbon, dry carbon fiber)
